mainText:
Promo: Bank of Entitlement - Where Every Customer is Royalty!

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, there I was, strolling into my favorite caf when I noticed they had run out of my preferred organic, fair-trade coffee blend. I immediately summoned the manager, a trembling soul who clearly wasn't prepared for my level of sophistication. With a carefully curated air of entitlement, I demanded to know how a place of such lowly stature could dare to disappoint their most revered patron-me. After a theatrical display of dismay that rivaled Shakespearean tragedy, I graciously allowed them to make it up to me by serving me the priciest blend on the house, accompanied by a humble apology note written with quivering hands. Ah, the sweet taste of victory! Another day, another triumph in the life of Hot Josh, the paragon of entitlement.
